mapper.select: SELECT * FROM silicone_orange_peel_uv_product ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM silicone_orange_peel_uv_product WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT * FROM silicone_orange_peel_uv_product WHERE material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR supplier_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR color LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO silicone_orange_peel_uv_product ( material_code, supplier_code, stock_code, material_name, usage_text, material_type, thickness, size_info, color, shape, responsible_person, min_paper_size, max_paper_size, min_dot, max_dot, min_line, max_line, min_spacing, max_spacing, min_pattern_area, max_pattern_area, structure_application, single_side, double_side, cover_page, book_spine, pit_position, inner_page, interface_paper_base_thickness, interface_paper_suitable, interface_paper_unsuitable, interface_ink_suitable, interface_ink_unsuitable, interface_coating_suitable, interface_coating_unsuitable, design_info, applicable_interface, notes, is_active ) VALUES ( #{materialCode}, #{supplierCode}, #{stockCode}, #{materialName}, #{usageText}, #{materialType}, #{thickness}, #{sizeInfo}, #{color}, #{shape}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{minPaperSize}, #{maxPaperSize}, #{minDot}, #{maxDot}, #{minLine}, #{maxLine}, #{minSpacing}, #{maxSpacing}, #{minPatternArea}, #{maxPatternArea}, #{structureApplication}, #{singleSide}, #{doubleSide}, #{coverPage}, #{bookSpine}, #{pitPosition}, #{innerPage}, #{interfacePaperBaseThickness}, #{interfacePaperSuitable}, #{interfacePaperUnsuitable}, #{interfaceInkSuitable}, #{interfaceInkUnsuitable}, #{interfaceCoatingSuitable}, #{interfaceCoatingUnsuitable}, #{designInfo}, #{applicableInterface}, #{notes}, #{isActive} )
mapper.update: UPDATE silicone_orange_peel_uv_product SET material_code = #{materialCode}, supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, stock_code = #{stockCode}, material_name = #{materialName}, usage_text = #{usageText}, material_type = #{materialType}, thickness = #{thickness}, size_info = #{sizeInfo}, color = #{color}, shape = #{shape}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, min_paper_size = #{minPaperSize}, max_paper_size = #{maxPaperSize}, min_dot = #{minDot}, max_dot = #{maxDot}, min_line = #{minLine}, max_line = #{maxLine}, min_spacing = #{minSpacing}, max_spacing = #{maxSpacing}, min_pattern_area = #{minPatternArea}, max_pattern_area = #{maxPatternArea}, structure_application = #{structureApplication}, single_side = #{singleSide}, double_side = #{doubleSide}, cover_page = #{coverPage}, book_spine = #{bookSpine}, pit_position = #{pitPosition}, inner_page = #{innerPage}, interface_paper_base_thickness = #{interfacePaperBaseThickness}, interface_paper_suitable = #{interfacePaperSuitable}, interface_paper_unsuitable = #{interfacePaperUnsuitable}, interface_ink_suitable = #{interfaceInkSuitable}, interface_ink_unsuitable = #{interfaceInkUnsuitable}, interface_coating_suitable = #{interfaceCoatingSuitable}, interface_coating_unsuitable = #{interfaceCoatingUnsuitable}, design_info = #{designInfo}, applicable_interface = #{applicableInterface}, notes = #{notes}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, p.material_name AS product_name FROM silicone_orange_peel_uv_compatibility c LEFT JOIN silicone_orange_peel_uv_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY c.display_order ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT c.*, p.material_name AS product_name FROM silicone_orange_peel_uv_compatibility c LEFT JOIN silicone_orange_peel_uv_product p ON c.product_id = p.id ORDER BY c.product_id ASC, c.display_order ASC, c.id ASC
SELECT c.*, p.material_name AS product_name FROM silicone_orange_peel_uv_compatibility c LEFT JOIN silicone_orange_peel_uv_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT c.*, p.material_name AS product_name FROM silicone_orange_peel_uv_compatibility c LEFT JOIN silicone_orange_peel_uv_product p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.product_id = #{productId} AND c.post_processing_step = #{postProcessingStep}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO silicone_orange_peel_uv_compatibility (product_id, post_processing_step, compatibility_status, display_order) VALUES (#{productId}, #{postProcessingStep}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{displayOrder})

INSERT INTO silicone_orange_peel_uv_compatibility (product_id, post_processing_step, compatibility_status, display_order) VALUES
(#{item.productId}, #{item.postProcessingStep}, #{item.compatibilityStatus}, #{item.displayOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT post_processing_step FROM silicone_orange_peel_uv_compatibility ORDER BY post_processing_step ASC
